sample_requests: Build a FastTree GTR+gamma phylogeny from asvs.fasta, attach to the AnnData, and run Faith PD + unweighted/weighted UniFrac
Compare Bray-Curtis, unweighted UniFrac, and weighted UniFrac PCoAs side by side on the mothur SOP cohort
Confirm UniFrac tip names match adata.var_names with attach_tree(strict=True)
Save the tree-augmented AnnData for downstream meta-analysis
Decide between unweighted and weighted UniFrac for a study of community membership vs dominant-taxa shifts

validation_budget.skip_reason: Source-grounded via inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc and direct reads of omicverse/alignment/build_phylogeny.py and omicverse/micro/_phylo.py + _diversity.py. Mothur SOP cohort serves as future smoke target; no live smoke run executed.
